final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-grade Chinese ethnic costume infographic for a national museum exhibition panel, intended for educational display and collection.

Style/medium: museum exhibition panel, historical costume encyclopedia infographic, Wenbo special-topic visual guide, archival paper texture
Composition: fixed five-zone layout — top header with Chinese title/subtitle/intro, left structural breakdown zone with callout lines and close-up details, upper-right material/texture zone with real fabric swatches, mid-right pattern/color/symbolism zone with color palette and motif samples, bottom wearing-order flowchart with core characteristics summary
Subject: Miao silver-ornamented festival costume (automatically selected as representative Chinese ethnic attire) — full-figure standing pose as central hero, surrounded by structural deconstruction callouts
Scene/backdrop: rice-white / silk-paper white / pale tea-toned paper texture background, archival museum display aesthetic
Lighting/mood: soft even museum lighting, restrained and scholarly atmosphere
Color palette: muted archival tones — ink black, cinnabar accents, indigo, silver-white, natural hemp beige, restrained and professional
Materials/textures: handwoven hemp, indigo-dyed cotton, hammered silver ornaments, embroidered silk panels, wax-resist batik patterns
Text (verbatim): 主标题:苗族盛装结构图鉴 / 副标题:黔东南支系节日盛装全解 / 导语:苗族服饰以银饰繁复、蜡染精湛、刺绣瑰丽著称，承载族群记忆与迁徙历史 / 结构拆解区引线标注:银角头饰、刺绣交领上衣、蜡染百褶裙、织花腰带、银项圈、银手镯、绑腿、绣花鞋 / 材质工艺区:手工锻打银饰、植物蓝靛蜡染、破线绣技法、手织亮布 / 纹样寓意区:涡旋纹(祖先迁徙)、蝴蝶纹(创世神话)、鱼纹(多子祈福)、主色板:靛蓝底、银白饰、朱红绣线 / 穿着流程:内衣→百褶裙→刺绣上衣→腰带→银饰层叠→头饰 / 核心特征:银饰重达数公斤、蜡染百褶裙层叠、刺绣图案无文字记史
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese, clear and legible, no garbled characters or English; realistic structural accuracy, authentic material representation, museum-grade professional finish; central figure in full standing pose with surrounding infographic zones
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography feel, e-commerce styling, anime or cosplay look, incorrect labels, blurred text, fake materials, excessive decoration, gradients, decorative clutter
